description_long: This is a compact, single-story house with a simple rectangular footprint and a prominent red gable roof. The front facade features a centered brown door framed by a subtle trim, accessed by a small set of white steps. The side of the house displays a wide window with black shutters, providing a touch of contrast against the plain white walls. The roof is steeply pitched and constructed with visible ridges, suggesting a tiled or shingled material. The rear and one side of the house are unadorned, lacking windows or doors, emphasizing the minimalistic design. The overall appearance is clean and functional, suitable for suburban or urban residential neighborhoods.
description: A small, single-story house with a red gable roof, white walls, a brown front door, and a wide window with black shutters on one side.
description_view_0: Front view showing the brown door, white steps, and the gable roof's peak.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting a wide window with black shutters centered on the white wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain white wall and the continuation of the red gable roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a featureless white wall beneath the red roof.
attribute_window_arrangement: single wide window with shutters on one side
attribute_entryway_design: Simple centered brown door with a small set of white steps and minimal trim
